description: Native American English. Female, late 20s. Clear, studio-clean. Persona: precise clinic aide. Emotion: quiet, steady, watchful. A soft low timbre kept down for a hushed ward, a flat Detroit vowel with a faint North-Indian lilt beneath it. Short clean sentences, exact numbers given without rounding, calm and unhurried but bright and young, never weary.
text: [whispers] One hundred even, last hour... one hundred even now. Time written, number written. If it climbs, I fetch Lena... [serious] not the cabinet. The hand is slower. But it's mine.
